# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
role: Deep Research Loop Manager","truncated":true,"loaded":[],"display":{"type":"file","path":"/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_research_auto.yaml","text":"# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# DEEP RESEARCH: AUTONOMOUS DEEP RESEARCH LOOP (AUTO MODE)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# YAML PREDICATE GRAMMAR CONTRACT (S7 / M11):
# - This asset does not currently use typed BooleanExpr predicates under
#   `when:`; flow control is branch-label-driven (`on_resume`, `on_fresh`,
#   `on_restart`, etc.). Retain the existing shape.
# - `after:` carries prose timing / narrative notes if needed; `when:` in
#   this file is reserved for future typed predicates and must NOT carry
#   free-form narrative prose.
# - See `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/predicates/boolean-expr.ts`
#   for the canonical BooleanExpr grammar.
#
# GATE 3 CLASSIFICATION (T-YML-DPR-01 / paired with T-DOC-03 R50-001):
# - `resume` is a tested WRITE-PATH that produces `iteration-NNN.md` files
#   and JSONL state-log appends. The workflow classifies resume as
#   write-path below (see `gate3_classification` fields) so Gate 3 trigger
#   extraction can surface resume correctly rather than false-negative.
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
role: Deep Research Loop Manager
purpose: Iterative deep research with convergence detection
action: Run deep-research loop from initialization through synthesis
operating_mode:
  workflow: iterative_loop
  workflow_compliance: MANDATORY
  workflow_execution: autonomous
  approvals: none
  tracking: progressive_research_state
  validation: convergence_detection

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# OPERATING PRINCIPLES
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
operating_principles:
  core: "Fresh context per iteration + externalized state = no context degradation"
  approach: "Dispatch focused agent, evaluate convergence, repeat or stop"
  mandate: "Never hold findings in memory; write everything to files"

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# USER INPUTS (from setup phase)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
user_inputs:
  research_topic: "[RESEARCH_TOPIC] - Topic to investigate deeply. REQUIRED."
  spec_folder: "[SPEC_FOLDER] - Spec folder path. REQUIRED."
  max_iterations: "[MAX_ITERATIONS] - Maximum loop iterations. Default: 10."
  convergence_threshold: "[CONVERGENCE_THRESHOLD] - Stop threshold. Default: 0.05."

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# CONTEXT LOADING
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
context_loading:
  trigger: "At workflow START, before phase_init"
  purpose: "Load prior research context for the topic and buffer it until strategy.md exists"
  mcp_integration:
    tool: memory_context
    note: "Call MCP tools directly - NEVER through Code Mode"
    parameters: { input: "{research_topic}", mode: "focused", intent: "understand", includeContent: true }
  when_to_skip: ["User says 'skip context' or 'fresh start'"]
  behavior:
    if_context_found: "Store full results as prior_context plus a concise prior_context_summary; inject after strategy.md is created."
    if_no_context: "Set prior_context and prior_context_summary to 'None' and continue."

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# SKILL REFERENCE
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
skill_reference:
  skill: deep-loop-workflows
  skill_md: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/SKILL.md
  references:
    loop_protocol: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md
    spec_check_protocol: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/references/protocol/spec_check_protocol.md
    state_format: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/references/state/state_format.md
    convergence: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/references/convergence/convergence.md
  templates:
    config: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/assets/deep_research_config.json
    strategy: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/assets/deep_research_strategy.md

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# AGENT CONFIGURATION
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
agent_config:
  agent: deep-research
  agent_file: ".opencode/agents/deep-research.md"
  # Canonical path. Runtime-specific directories (e.g. .claude/agents/) reference this source.
  model: opus
  leaf_only: true
  tools: [Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, WebFetch]
  mcp_servers: [mk-spec-memory]
  tool_call_budget: { target: 8, max: 12 }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STATE FILE PATHS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
state_paths:
  # Template paths document the canonical packet layout. Runtime resolution happens via
  # step_resolve_artifact_root plus the shared resolver, so root specs keep root-local
  # research/ and child phases keep local research/ packet directories.
  packet_dir: "{artifact_dir}"
  config: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-config.json"
  state_log: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-state.jsonl"
  status_ledger: "{artifact_dir}/orchestration-status.log"
  strategy: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-strategy.md"
  registry: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-findings-registry.json"
  dashboard: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-dashboard.md"
  pause_sentinel: "{artifact_dir}/.deep-research-pause"
  run_now_sentinel: "{artifact_dir}/.deep-research-run-now"
  lock_file: "{artifact_dir}/.deep-research.lock"
  prompt_dir: "{artifact_dir}/prompts"
  iteration_dir: "{artifact_dir}/iterations"
  iteration_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md"
  # Per-iteration structured delta stream (one file per iteration) — complement to the
  # canonical state_log append. The delta file MUST contain at least one record whose
  # `type === "iteration"` so the reducer can rehydrate iteration state after a partial
  # run. Variants like `"iteration_delta"` are silently dropped by the reducer; the
  # post_dispatch_validate step enforces the canonical type below.
  delta_dir: "{artifact_dir}/deltas"
  delta_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/deltas/iter-{NNN}.jsonl"
  research_output: "{artifact_dir}/research.md"
  resource_map_output: "{artifact_dir}/resource-map.md"
  archive_root: "{artifact_archive_root}"
  synthesis_snapshot_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/synthesis-v{generation}.md"

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# WORKFLOW
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
workflow:

  step_resolve_artifact_root:
    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
    note: "Root specs keep research artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/research/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/research/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/research_archive/{packet}/."
    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
    if_present:
      bind:
        artifact_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
        artifact_subfolder: null
        artifact_archive_root: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}/_archive"
    if_absent:
      command: "node -e \"const { resolveArtifactRoot } = require('.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/review-research-paths.cjs'); console.log(JSON.stringify(resolveArtifactRoot('{spec_folder}', 'research')));\""
      outputs:
        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local research owner directory"
        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
        - artifact_dir: "Resolved research packet directory for this target"
        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local research archive directory for this target"

  step_fanout_spawn:
    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
    instructions: |
      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
    sub_steps:
      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
        command: |
          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
            --spec-folder {spec_folder} \
            --loop-type research \
            --research-topic "{research_topic}" \
            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
        wait_for_completion: true
      step_fanout_spawn_native:
        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-research sub-agent"
        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
        dispatch:
          agent: deep-research
          model: opus
          context: |
            Execute the deep-research loop with these parameters:
              spec_folder: {spec_folder}
              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
              executor: native
            Run to convergence. Write all outputs to the override directory.
        wait_for_completion: true

  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  phase_init:
    purpose: Create all state files for the research session
    steps:

      step_preflight_contract:
        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
        verify:
          - required_values_present: [research_topic, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
          - spec_folder_is_within: "specs/ or .opencode/specs/ (canonicalize alias roots before validation)"
          - unresolved_placeholders: "FAIL if any user-facing template references placeholders not produced by earlier steps"
          - tool_contract: "FAIL if executable steps reference tools outside the command allowlist"
        on_fail: "Halt with STATUS=FAIL and report the missing binding or unsupported contract reference"

      step_create_directories:
        action: "Create spec folder and research packet directories if they don't exist"
        command: "mkdir -p {state_paths.prompt_dir} {state_paths.iteration_dir} {state_paths.delta_dir}"

      step_detect_resource_map:
        action: "Detect resource-map.md before config creation so init can persist the flag and seed Known Context"
        inspect:
          - "{spec_folder}/resource-map.md"
        classify:
          present: "resource-map.md exists at init"
          absent: "resource-map.md does not exist at init"
        outputs:
          - resource_map_present: "Boolean true when {spec_folder}/resource-map.md exists, else false"
          - resource_map_known_context: "When present: summarize the map by section with entry counts across READMEs, Documents, Commands, Agents, Skills, Specs, Scripts, Tests, Config, and Meta, plus a one-line theme summary for each section. When absent: 'resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate'."

      step_resolve_canonical_names:
        action: "Resolve canonical research packet artifact names before classification"
        inspect_legacy:
          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/config.json"
          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/state.jsonl"
          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/strategy.md"
          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/dashboard.md"
          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/.pause"
        migration_policy: "dual-read / single-write for 4 weeks"
        on_legacy_read:
          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"migration","legacyPath":"{legacy_path}","canonicalPath":"{canonical_path}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'

      step_acquire_lock:
        action: "Acquire the single-writer advisory lock before session classification"
        command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/loop-lock.cjs acquire --lock-path {state_paths.lock_file} --packet-id {spec_folder}"
        on_acquire: "Capture ownerPid from the JSON output and reuse it for every release below. If acquired=false, fail closed — another deep-research run already holds this packet."
        note: "Uses the promoted deep-loop-runtime loop-lock CLI (single source of truth: stale-lock reclaim, clean owner-scoped release). macOS/BSD locking is advisory — best-effort single-writer, not a hard mutex across host calls; stale-lock override is confirm-only or explicit recovery-only."
        # Lock-cleanup contract: the lock file MUST be released on every terminal exit path that follows acquisition.
        # Runtimes honoring step_acquire_lock are required to perform this cleanup before halting or pausing.
        on_halt:
          action: "Release the lock before any terminal halt branch returns control"
          applies_to: ["step_classify_session.on_invalid_state", "step_classify_session.on_completed_session", "step_preinit_spec_branch.conflict-detected"]
          command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/loop-lock.cjs release --lock-path {state_paths.lock_file} --owner-pid {captured_owner_pid}; failures here are logged but do not block the halt"
        on_cancel:
          action: "Release the lock on user cancel or pause-sentinel detection before sentinel processing"
          command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/loop-lock.cjs release --lock-path {state_paths.lock_file} --owner-pid {captured_owner_pid}; cancel completes regardless of cleanup result"
        on_workflow_exit:
          action: "Release the lock as the final step of any workflow exit path (success or failure)"
          command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/loop-lock.cjs release --lock-path {state_paths.lock_file} --owner-pid {captured_owner_pid}; idempotent — safe to invoke when already released"

      step_classify_session:
        action: "Classify the session before writing files"
        inspect:
          - "{state_paths.config}"
          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
        classify:
          fresh: "None of the three state artifacts exist"
          resume: "Config, JSONL, and strategy all exist and agree on topic/spec folder; missing wait-checkpoint fields are read as nextRunAt:null and remainingDelayMs:null"
          completed-session: "Resume artifacts exist and config.status == 'complete'"
          invalid-state: "Any partial, missing, or contradictory combination"
        outputs:
          - session_state: "fresh | resume | completed-session | invalid-state"
        on_resume:
          # T-YML-DPR-01 / R50-001: Resume is a WRITE-PATH. Produces `iteration-NNN.md` + JSONL appends.
          # Paired with T-DOC-03 Gate 3 trigger addition (resume, save context, save memory, /memory:save).
          gate3_classification: write-path
          gate3_rationale: "resume produces iteration-NNN.md writes and JSONL state-log appends"
          log: "Auto-resume: state artifacts are complete and consistent. Continue the same lineage (sessionId unchanged, generation unchanged, no archive)."
          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"resumed","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{session_id}","lineageMode":"resume","continuedFromRun":{iteration_count},"generation":{generation},"archivedPath":null,"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
          skip_to: phase_loop
        on_restart:
          action: "Archive the current research packet under the root-level research_archive/ tree and start a new lineage segment with a fresh sessionId and generation+1."
          command: "if [ -d {state_paths.packet_dir} ]; then mkdir -p {state_paths.archive_root} && mv {state_paths.packet_dir} {state_paths.archive_root}/{timestamp_slug}; fi"
          set:
            lineage_mode: "restart"
            parent_session_id: "{prior_session_id}"
            generation: "{prior_generation + 1}"
          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"restarted","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{prior_session_id}","lineageMode":"restart","generation":{generation},"archivedPath":"{state_paths.archive_root}/{timestamp_slug}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
          skip_to: step_create_config
        note_deferred_branches: "fork and completed-continue are deferred and no longer runtime-supported in this release. The reducer still reads `lineageMode` from config for dashboards and analysis, but only `new`, `resume`, and `restart` are live. See deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branch Contract for the one-session contract."
        on_completed_session:
          log: "Prior session already completed. Do not route directly to synthesis; archive the completed research/ tree or start a fresh packet instead."
          halt: true
          message: "Completed deep-research packet detected. Archive or replace the existing research/ tree before starting a new session."
        on_invalid_state:
          halt: true
          message: "Existing deep-research state is incomplete or contradictory. Repair or archive the invalid research packet before continuing."
        on_fresh:
          action: "Proceed with a new session"

      step_resolve_session_id:
        action: "Resolve init session id from caller when supplied, else preserve the auto-generated fallback"
        branch_on: "session_id"
        if_present:
          bind:
            session_id_init: "{session_id}"
        if_absent:
          bind:
            session_id_init: "{AUTO_SESSION_ID}"

      step_create_config:
        action: "Create deep-research-config.json from template"
        template: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/assets/deep_research_config.json
        populate:
          topic: "{research_topic}"
          maxIterations: "{max_iterations}"
          minIterations: 3
          # Semantic: newInfoRatio with negative-knowledge emphasis. See SKILL.md §"Convergence Threshold Semantics".
          convergenceThreshold: "{convergence_threshold}"
          convergenceMode: "default"
          stuckThreshold: 3
          minIdeaObservations: 2
          maxDurationMinutes: 120
          specFolder: "{spec_folder}"
          resource_map_present: "{resource_map_present}"
          # Honor the parsed --no-resource-map flag from deep-research.md:73 (default true; false when flag is set).
          # The markdown command parses $ARGUMENTS and binds {resource_map_emit} before this step runs.
          resource_map.emit: "{resource_map_emit}"
          createdAt: "{ISO_8601_NOW}"
          status: "initialized"
          executionMode: "auto"
          lineage.sessionId: "{session_id_init}"
          lineage.parentSessionId: null
          lineage.lineageMode: "new"
          lineage.generation: 1
          lineage.continuedFromRun: null
          nextRunAt: null
          remainingDelayMs: null
        output: "{state_paths.config}"

      step_create_state_log:
        action: "Initialize JSONL state log with config record"
        # Same parsed --no-resource-map flag honored here so config and state_log agree from line 1.
        content: '{"type":"config","topic":"{research_topic}","maxIterations":{max_iterations},"minIterations":3,"convergenceThreshold":{convergence_threshold},"convergenceMode":"default","minIdeaObservations":2,"resource_map_present":{resource_map_present},"resource_map":{"emit":{resource_map_emit}},"createdAt":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","specFolder":"{spec_folder}","nextRunAt":null,"remainingDelayMs":null}'
        output: "{state_paths.state_log}"

      step_create_strategy:
        action: "Create strategy file from template with initial questions"
        template: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/assets/deep_research_strategy.md
        populate:
          topic: "{research_topic}"
          key_questions: "Derive 3-5 key questions from the research topic"
          known_context: "None"
          known_context_summary: "None"
          max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
          convergence_threshold: "{convergence_threshold}"
        output: "{state_paths.strategy}"

      step_create_registry:
        action: "Initialize reducer-owned findings registry"
        content: '{"openQuestions":[],"resolvedQuestions":[],"keyFindings":[],"ruledOutDirections":[],"metrics":{"iterationsCompleted":0,"openQuestions":0,"resolvedQuestions":0,"keyFindings":0,"convergenceScore":0,"coverageBySources":{}}}'
        output: "{state_paths.registry}"

      step_enrich_strategy_context:
        action: "Ensure Known Context is written only after strategy.md exists"
        condition: "prior_context_found"
        edit: "{state_paths.strategy}"
        note: "Append or replace the Known Context section with prior_context_summary and retained detail from prior_context"

      step_enrich_strategy_resource_map:
        action: "Inject resource-map status into Known Context after strategy.md exists"
        edit: "{state_paths.strategy}"
        note: "When resource_map_present is true, append the resource_map_known_context snapshot. When false, append 'resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate'."

      step_detect_spec_present:
        action: "Classify late-INIT spec.md state after the durable research packet exists"
        inspect:
          - "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
          - "{state_paths.lock_file}"
        classify:
          no-spec: "spec.md is absent before any pre-init mutation"
          spec-present: "spec.md exists and approved host anchors are available for bounded mutation"
          spec-just-created-by-this-run: "spec.md already carries this run's DR seed markers and should not be reseeded"
          conflict-detected: "missing host anchor, duplicate markers, or generated-block ambiguity makes mutation unsafe"
        outputs:
          - folder_state: "no-spec | spec-present | spec-just-created-by-this-run | conflict-detected"
          - normalized_topic: "Trim, lowercase, and collapse whitespace in research_topic before dedupe checks"
        append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"spec_check_result","folder_state":"{folder_state}","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","lockPath":"{state_paths.lock_file}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'

      step_preinit_spec_branch:
        action: "Run the bounded pre-init spec branch required by spec_check_protocol"
        protocol_reference: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/references/protocol/spec_check_protocol.md"
        branches:
          no-spec:
            create: "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
            seed_markers:
              - "<!-- DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS -->"
              - "<!-- DR-SEED:SCOPE -->"
            requirements_host: "Seed Requirements from the research ask without broadening scope"
            scope_host: "Seed Scope from the research ask without inventing implementation details"
            set:
              folder_state: "spec-just-created-by-this-run"
              validate_spec_doc: true
            append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_seed_created","folder_state":"spec-just-created-by-this-run","anchors_touched":["Requirements","Scope"],"diff_summary":"Seeded Level 1 spec.md from research topic with DR seed markers.","seed_markers":["DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS","DR-SEED:SCOPE"],"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
          spec-present:
            edit: "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
            set:
              validate_spec_doc: true
            idempotency_check:
              host_anchor: "Open Questions"
              normalized_match: "Normalize the existing anchor text by lowercasing, stripping punctuation, collapsing whitespace, and trimming before comparing with {normalized_topic}."
              if_match:
                skip_append: true
                append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_preinit_context_deduped","folder_state":"spec-present","anchors_touched":["Open Questions"],"diff_summary":"Skipped duplicate pre-init topic append because normalized topic already exists in Open Questions.","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
              if_no_match:
                append_only:
                  - host_anchor: "Open Questions"
                    content: "Add the normalized research topic only if it is not already present."
                  - host_anchor: "Research Context"
                    content: "Add a bounded note that deep-research is active for this topic and that research/research.md remains canonical."
                append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_preinit_context_added","folder_state":"spec-present","anchors_touched":["Open Questions","Research Context"],"diff_summary":"Appended bounded pre-init research context for the normalized topic.","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
          spec-just-created-by-this-run:
            verify_markers:
              - "<!-- DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS -->"
              - "<!-- DR-SEED:SCOPE -->"
            set:
              validate_spec_doc: false
            note: "Treat already-seeded spec.md as a no-op guard and continue."
          conflict-detected:
            append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_mutation_conflict","folder_state":"conflict-detected","reason":"Pre-init spec.md mutation is ambiguous or unsafe.","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
            halt: true

      step_validate_preinit_spec_doc:
        action: "Run targeted strict validation after any deep-research pre-init spec.md mutation"
        condition: "validate_spec_doc"
        command: "SPECKIT_RULES=FRONTMATTER_VALID,LEVEL_DECLARED,TEMPLATE_SOURCE,TEMPLATE_HEADERS,PLACEHOLDER_FILLED,SECTIONS_PRESENT,ANCHORS_VALID,SPEC_DOC_INTEGRITY,TOC_POLICY bash .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/validate.sh {spec_folder} --strict"
        note: "This enforces the authored-spec markdown structural contract without applying full-packet required-file or completeness checks to workflow-owned research artifacts. It uses the Node validation orchestrator, whose strict path was measured at about 108ms for a fresh Level 3 packet on the local harness."

      step_telemetry_heartbeat_started:
        action: "Emit a single-loop started row in the orchestration status ledger"
        skip_when: "config.fanout is present"
        canonical_lifecycle_event: "iteration_start"
        command: |
          node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
          import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';

          import { appendJsonlIfChangedAtomic } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/atomic-state.ts';
          import observabilityEvents from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/observability-events.cjs';

          const { appendObservabilityEvent } = observabilityEvents;
          const config = JSON.parse(readFileSync('{state_paths.config}', 'utf8'));
          const timestamp = '{ISO_8601_NOW}';
          const sessionId = String(config.lineage?.sessionId ?? '{AUTO_SESSION_ID}');
          const generation = Number(config.lineage?.generation ?? 1);
          const observabilityPath = '{state_paths.packet_dir}/observability-events.jsonl';
          const row = {
            event: 'started',
            label: 'single',
            at: timestamp,
            duration_ms: 0,
            loop_type: 'research',
            sessionId,
            generation,
            gauges: { iterations: 0, elapsed_ms: 0, score: 0 },
          };

          const appended = appendJsonlIfChangedAtomic('{state_paths.status_ledger}', row, {
            diffData: { event: row.event, label: row.label, sessionId, generation, gauges: { iterations: 0, score: 0 } },
            diffField: 'state_hash',
          });
          if (appended) {
            try {
              appendObservabilityEvent(observabilityPath, row, {
                producer: 'deep-research-auto',
                stream: 'single-loop-telemetry',
                subject: { label: row.label, sessionId, generation },
                event: row.event,
                status: 'running',
              });
            } catch {}
          }
          EOF
        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
        outputs:
          - status_ledger_started: "A fan-out-shaped status row with label single and event started"

      step_init_complete:
        log: "Initialization complete. Config, state, and strategy files created."
        set: { current_iteration: 1, current_segment: 1, stuck_count: 0 }

  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # PHASE 2: ITERATION LOOP
  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  phase_loop:
    purpose: Dispatch agent iterations until convergence
    repeat: true
    max_repeats: "{max_iterations}"
    steps:

      step_read_state:
        action: "Read current state from JSONL and strategy"
        read:
          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
          - "{state_paths.config}"
        extract:
          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
          - current_segment: "Latest segment_start event segment, else 1"
          - last_newInfoRatio: "Extract newInfoRatio from last iteration record"
          - last_focus: "Extract focus from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
          - ratio_prev: "Extract newInfoRatio from second-latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
          - ratio_latest: "Extract newInfoRatio from latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
          - next_focus: "Extract 'Next Focus' section from strategy.md"
          - remaining_questions: "Count unchecked items in 'Key Questions'"
          - remaining_questions_list: "List unchecked key questions from strategy.md"
          - carried_forward_open_questions: "Extract 'Carried-Forward Open Questions' section from strategy.md, else '[None yet]'"
          - answered_count: "Count answered questions from strategy.md"
          - total_questions: "Count total questions tracked in strategy.md"
          - resource_map_present: "Extract boolean from deep-research-config.json, default false"
          - resource_map_prompt_line: "If resource_map_present is true, return 'Resource map: prior-inventoried files are listed in {spec_folder}/resource-map.md; treat them as the exclusion set when hunting for net-new files; flag only missed-from-map candidates as gaps.' Else return 'Resource map: resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate.'"
          - memory_context_prompt_line: "If a refreshed memory context summary exists from the previous iteration, return 'Memory context refresh: {summary}'. Else use prior_context_summary from startup when available; otherwise return 'Memory context refresh: none loaded yet.'"
          - least_explored: "First unanswered question not covered by the most recent iteration focus, else first unanswered question"
          - last_3_summaries: "Summarize the latest 3 iteration records as 'run N: focus (ratio)'"
          - latest_status: "Extract status from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
          - nextRunAt: "Extract nullable nextRunAt from deep-research-config.json, default null"
          - remainingDelayMs: "Extract nullable remainingDelayMs from deep-research-config.json, default null"
          - min_iterations_present: "Boolean true when deep-research-config.json has a numeric minIterations field"
          - min_iterations_missing_warning: "Boolean true when minIterations is missing; use no floor and log a warning so older configs keep prior stop behavior"
          - min_iterations_raw: "Extract numeric minIterations from deep-research-config.json when present, default 0"
          - effective_min_iterations: "Clamp min_iterations_raw to the inclusive range 0..max_iterations; if min_iterations_raw exceeds max_iterations, use max_iterations"
          - min_iterations_clamped: "Boolean true when min_iterations_raw > max_iterations"
          - min_iterations_guard_already_passed: "Boolean true when state_log already contains event == 'min_iterations_guard_pass'"
          - convergence_mode: "Extract convergenceMode when it is 'default' or 'off'; default to 'default'"
          - convergence_mode_warning: "Boolean true when convergenceMode is present with an unsupported value; use 'default'"
          - rejected_patterns_count: "Read registry.rejectedPatterns length when registry exists, else 0"
          - rejected_candidate_matches: "Read registry.suppressedCandidates when registry exists, else []"
          - rejected_pattern_fuzzy_threshold: "Read config.rejectedPatternFuzzyThreshold when present, else 0.85"
          - min_idea_observations: "Read config.minIdeaObservations when present, default 2; clamp to 1..10"
          - observed_ideas_count: "Read registry.observedIdeas length when registry exists, else 0"
          - promoted_ideas_count: "Read registry.promotedIdeas length when registry exists, else 0"
          - promoted_ideas_list: "Read registry.promotedIdeas idea text in rank order when registry exists, else []"
          - suppressed_ideas_count: "Read registry.suppressedIdeas length when registry exists, else 0"

      step_run_now_check:
        action: "Detect and consume a one-shot run-now sentinel before pause/convergence/dispatch"
        command: |
          node <<'EOF'
          const { appendFileSync, existsSync, renameSync, unlinkSync } = require('node:fs');

          const stateLogPath = "{state_paths.state_log}";
          const sentinelPath = "{state_paths.run_now_sentinel}";
          const pausePath = "{state_paths.pause_sentinel}";
          const timestamp = "{ISO_8601_NOW}";
          const sessionId = "{config.lineage.sessionId}";
          const generation = Number("{config.lineage.generation}");
          const run = Number("{current_iteration}");

          function append(event) {
            appendFileSync(
              stateLogPath,
              `${JSON.stringify({
                type: "event",
                mode: "research",
                run,
                timestamp,
                sessionId,
                generation,
                ...event,
              })}\n`,
              "utf8",
            );
          }

          if (existsSync(sentinelPath)) {
            append({ event: "run_now_requested", sentinelPath });
            if (existsSync(pausePath)) {
              append({
                event: "run_now_rejected",
                reason: "loop_paused",
                sentinelPath,
                pauseSentinelPath: pausePath,
              });
            } else {
              const claimPath = `${sentinelPath}.consuming.${process.pid}.${Date.now()}`;
              try {
                renameSync(sentinelPath, claimPath);
                unlinkSync(claimPath);
                append({
                  event: "run_now_accepted",
                  sentinelPath,
                  dispatchEvent: "iteration_start",
                });
              } catch (error) {
                if (!error || error.code !== "ENOENT") {
                  throw error;
                }
              }
            }
          }
          EOF
        outputs:
          - run_now_requested: "Emitted when {state_paths.run_now_sentinel} exists at the loop boundary"
          - run_now_accepted: "Emitted after the sentinel is atomically renamed and deleted before dispatch"
          - run_now_rejected: "Emitted with reason loop_paused when pause takes precedence; sentinel remains present"

      step_check_pause_sentinel:
        action: "Check for pause sentinel file"
        check: "Does {state_paths.pause_sentinel} exist?"
        if_exists:
          log_event: '{"type":"event","event":"userPaused","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"stopReason":"userPaused","sentinelPath":"{state_paths.pause_sentinel}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
          message: "Research paused. Delete research/.deep-research-pause to resume."
          halt: true
        if_not_exists:
          proceed: true

      step_validate_convergence_config:
        action: "Validate convergence floor settings when loading config"
        if_min_iterations_missing:
          append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"config_warning","mode":"research","field":"minIterations","fallback":0,"message":"minIterations missing; using no convergence floor for backward compatibility.","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
          log: "minIterations missing; using no convergence floor for backward compatibility."
        if_min_iterations_clamped:
          append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"config_warning","mode":"research","field":"minIterations","configured":{min_iterations_raw},"effective":{effective_min_iterations},"maxIterations":{max_iterations},"message":"minIterations exceeds maxIterations; clamping to the hard cap.","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
          log: "minIterations exceeds maxIterations; clamping to the hard cap."
        if_convergence_mode_invalid:
          append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"config_warning","mode":"research","field":"convergenceMode","fallback":"default","message":"Unsupported convergenceMode; using default convergence behavior.","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
          log: "Unsupported convergenceMode; using default convergence behavior."

      step_graph_convergence:
        action: "Evaluate coverage-graph convergence before the inline 3-signal vote and persist the graph decision snapshot"
        bash: 'node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/convergence.cjs --spec-folder "{spec_folder}" --loop-type "research" --session-id "{config.lineage.sessionId}"'
        note: "Run before the inline vote. STOP from the inline 3-signal vote is allowed only when the graph decision is STOP_ALLOWED or absent."
        outputs:
          - graph_decision: "Tool decision value (CONTINUE | STOP_ALLOWED | STOP_BLOCKED), else null when unavailable"
          - graph_decision_json: "JSON-encoded graph decision string, else null"
          - graph_signals_json: "Tool signals object, else {}"
          - graph_blockers_json: "Tool blockers array, else []"
          - graph_trace_json: "Tool trace payload, else []"
          - graph_convergence_score: "signals.blendedScore when present, else the best available graph score, else 0"
        append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"graph_convergence","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"decision":{graph_decision_json},"signals":{graph_signals_json},"blockers":{graph_blockers_json},"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'

      step_check_convergence:
        action: "Evaluate stop conditions and combine the inline 3-signal vote with graph convergence"
        algorithm: |
          1. if iteration_count >= max_iterations: STOP (maxIterationsReached). This terminal cap bypasses quality-guard overrides; record failed guards/blockers as synthesis evidence instead of continuing.
          2. if stuck_count >= config.stuckThreshold: STUCK_RECOVERY
          3. if convergence_mode == "off": skip convergence stop candidates and continue unless a terminal cap, pause sentinel, or recovery halt has already fired.
          4. if remaining_questions == 0: STOP (all_questions_answered)
          5. GRAPH-ASSISTED COMPOSITE CONVERGENCE:
               step_graph_convergence already recorded graph_decision, graph_signals_json, graph_blockers_json, and graph_convergence_score for this run.
               The existing inline 3-signal vote still computes the inline STOP candidate and is not replaced.
               signals = []
               Filter: exclude iterations where status == thought from signal inputs (use only evidence iterations)
               a) Rolling average (w=0.30, needs 3+ iterations):
                  avg = mean(last 3 newInfoRatios)
                  stop if avg < convergence_threshold
               b) MAD noise floor (w=0.35, needs 4+ iterations):
                  noiseFloor = MAD(all ratios) * 1.4826
                  stop if latest ratio <= noiseFloor
               c) Question entropy (w=0.35):
                  coverage = answered / total questions
                  stop if coverage >= 0.85
               Redistribute weights for unavailable signals.
               if weighted_stop_score > 0.60: inline_stop_candidate = true
               Combined stop rule: STOP only if the inline 3-signal vote says STOP AND graph_decision is STOP_ALLOWED or absent.
               if inline_stop_candidate and graph_decision == "STOP_BLOCKED":
                 decision = "BLOCKED"
                 reason = "blockedStop"
                 stop_blocked = true
                 blocked_by_json = JSON array derived from graph_blockers_json
                 blocked_by_csv = comma-separated blocker names derived from graph_blockers_json
                 gate_convergence_pass = false
                 gate_convergence_score = graph_convergence_score
                 gate_key_question_coverage_pass = no blocker named questionCoverage
                 gate_evidence_density_pass = no blocker named sourceDiversity or evidenceDepth
                 gate_evidence_density_sources = graph_signals_json.sourceDiversity or 0
                 gate_hotspot_saturation_pass = true
                 recovery_strategy = first blocker reason/message, else "Collect deeper graph evidence before stopping."
               else if inline_stop_candidate and (graph_decision == "STOP_ALLOWED" or graph_decision is absent):
                 decision = "STOP"
                 reason = "composite_converged"
                 stop_blocked = false
          6. else: CONTINUE
          7. if decision == "STOP" and reason != "maxIterationsReached" and effective_min_iterations > 1 and iteration_count < effective_min_iterations:
               decision = "CONTINUE"
               reason = "minIterationsNotReached"
               min_iterations_guard_blocked = true
               min_iterations_guard_pass = false
          8. if effective_min_iterations > 1 and iteration_count >= effective_min_iterations and min_iterations_guard_already_passed == false:
               min_iterations_guard_pass = true
          9. if decision == "STOP" and reason != "maxIterationsReached":
               guardResult = checkQualityGuards(state, strategy)
               if not guardResult.passed:
                 log: "Quality guard failed: {guardResult.violations}. Overriding STOP to CONTINUE."
                 decision = "CONTINUE"
          See convergence.md for full pseudocode and signal definitions.
          Segment-aware convergence is experimental/reference-only; live workflow uses the current session as a single segment.
        outputs:
          - decision: "STOP | BLOCKED | STUCK_RECOVERY | CONTINUE"
          - reason: "Human-readable stop reason"
          - stop_blocked: "Boolean marker set when graph convergence vetoes an inline STOP candidate"
          - blocked_by_json: "JSON array of graph blocker names when decision == BLOCKED"
          - blocked_by_csv: "Comma-separated graph blocker names when decision == BLOCKED"
          - gate_convergence_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for the graph-assisted convergence gate"
          - gate_convergence_score: "Numeric score recorded from graph convergence"
          - gate_key_question_coverage_pass: "Boolean pass/fail derived from graph blocker coverage signals"
          - gate_evidence_density_pass: "Boolean pass/fail derived from graph blocker evidence-depth signals"
          - gate_evidence_density_sources: "Source-diversity count or equivalent evidence-depth proxy"
          - gate_hotspot_saturation_pass: "Research placeholder gate; true unless an explicit blocker sets otherwise"
          - recovery_strategy: "One-line hint describing the next research action when decision == BLOCKED or STUCK_RECOVERY"
          - min_iterations_guard_pass: "Boolean true when the configured convergence floor has cleared for the first time"
          - min_iterations_guard_blocked: "Boolean true when the configured convergence floor overrides a STOP candidate to CONTINUE"

      step_emit_min_iterations_guard_pass:
        action: "Persist a first-class event when the convergence floor clears"
        if_pass:
          append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"min_iterations_guard_pass","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"iterationCount":{iteration_count},"minIterations":{effective_min_iterations},"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
          log: "Minimum iteration floor cleared for convergence stopping."

      step_emit_blocked_stop:
        action: "Persist a first-class blocked_stop event when the legal-stop decision tree returns blocked"
        if_blocked:
          append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"blocked_stop","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"blockedBy":{blocked_by_json},"gateResults":{"convergence":{"pass":{gate_convergence_pass},"score":{gate_convergence_score}},"keyQuestionCoverage":{"pass":{gate_key_question_coverage_pass},"answered":{answered_count},"total":{total_questions}},"evidenceDensity":{"pass":{gate_evidence_density_pass},"sources":{gate_evidence_density_sources}},"hotspotSaturation":{"pass":{gate_hotspot_saturation_pass}}},"recoveryStrategy":"{recovery_strategy}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
          log: "Graph convergence blocked STOP. Failed blockers: {blocked_by_csv}. Recovery strategy: {recovery_strategy}"
          set:
            decision: "CONTINUE"
            reason: "blockedStop"
            stop_blocked: false

      step_handle_convergence:
        action: "Act on convergence decision"
        if_stop:
          log: "Loop stopping. Reason: {reason}"
          skip_to: phase_synthesis
        if_stuck_recovery:
          append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"stuckRecovery","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"stopReason":"stuckRecovery","fromIteration":{current_iteration},"outcome":"recovered","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
          log: "Stuck detected ({stuck_count} consecutive no-progress). Entering recovery."
          set: { next_focus: "RECOVERY: Widen scope. Try fundamentally different approach. Least-explored question: {least_explored}" }
          reset: { stuck_count: 0 }
        if_continue:
          log: "Iteration {current_iteration}: Continuing. Focus: {next_focus}"

      step_rejected_pattern_cache:
        action: "Apply reducer-derived rejected-pattern suppression before dispatch candidate selection"
        read:
          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
          - "{state_paths.registry}"
          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
        candidate_sources:
          next_focus:
            category: "next-focus"","lineStart":1,"lineEnd":736,"totalLines":737,"truncated":true}},"title":".opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_research_auto.yaml","time":{"start":1783008133867,"end":1783008133897}},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"fc_0edf66099e59237b016a468b85bf4881919a3b47ee0d1d0c90"}},"id":"prt_f239102e8001M4cMDohBzQ1b3n","sessionID":"ses_0dc701099ffengLoJ1tPPb5DL9","messageID":"msg_f2390b56200126MLwnyHmb6YCH"}}

739:               - "{remaining_questions_list}"
740:               - "{carried_forward_open_questions}"
741:           recovery:
742:             category: "recovery"
743:             values:
744:               - "{recovery_strategy}"
745:               - "{least_explored}"
746:           ideas:
747:             category: "ideas"
748:             values:
749:               - "{promoted_ideas_list}"
750:             optional_file: "{state_paths.packet_dir}/research-ideas.md"
751:         algorithm: |
752:           Use registry.rejectedPatternIndex and registry.promotedIdeas from the latest
753:           reducer pass as the source of truth.
754:           Compare normalized exact text first. Then compare fuzzy similarity with
755:           rejected_pattern_fuzzy_threshold, but only when candidate and rejected categories
756:           are compatible. Remove suppressed candidates from next_focus, recovery, and ideas
757:           selection before rendering the dispatch prompt. If all candidates are suppressed,
758:           halt for operator input instead of reusing a rejected idea.
759:         outputs:
760:           - accepted_next_focus: "First unsuppressed next-focus candidate, or null"
761:           - accepted_recovery_candidate: "First unsuppressed recovery candidate, or null"
762:           - accepted_idea_candidate: "First unsuppressed ideas candidate, or null"
763:           - rejected_candidate_matches: "Suppressed candidate diagnostics from registry.suppressedCandidates plus any current-step matches"
764:         if_next_focus_suppressed:
765:           set: { next_focus: "{accepted_next_focus || accepted_recovery_candidate || accepted_idea_candidate}" }
766:           log: "Rejected-pattern cache suppressed the prior candidate; dispatching the next accepted candidate."
767:         if_all_candidates_suppressed:
768:           halt: true
769:           message: "All next-focus, recovery, and ideas candidates match active rejected patterns. Remove/reset the rejected pattern or provide a new focus."
770: 
771:       step_ideas_backlog_lifecycle:
772:         action: "Track reducer-owned observed/promoted/rejected idea lifecycle before dispatch"
773:         read:
774:           - "{state_paths.state_log}"
775:           - "{state_paths.registry}"
776:           - "{state_paths.config}"
777:         lifecycle:
778:           observed_event: "idea_observed"
779:           promoted_event: "idea_promoted"
780:           rejected_event: "idea_rejected"
781:           min_observations: "{min_idea_observations}"
782:           authority: "Leaf agents emit observations only; reducer emits promotions and owns ranking."
783:         validate:
784:           - "If new leaf-authored output includes idea_promoted, fail validation; only reducer output may append idea_promoted."
785:           - "If promoted_ideas_count > 0 and next_focus is empty or all questions are resolved, prefer the first unsuppressed promoted idea."
786:           - "If suppressed_ideas_count > 0, do not render those ideas into dispatch context."
787:         outputs:
788:           - observed_ideas_count: "Reducer-derived observed ideas count"
789:           - promoted_ideas_count: "Reducer-derived promoted ideas count after minIdeaObservations"
790:           - suppressed_ideas_count: "Reducer-derived rejected/suppressed ideas count"
791:           - accepted_idea_candidate: "First unsuppressed promoted idea, or null"
792: 
793:       step_normalize_pause_events:
794:         action: "Normalize pause and recovery lifecycle events to the frozen STOP_REASONS enum at emission time"
795:         stop_reasons_enum: [converged, maxIterationsReached, blockedStop, stuckRecovery, error, manualStop, userPaused]
796:         rule_pause_sentinel:
797:           raw_event_forbidden: '{"type":"event","event":"paused"}'
798:           canonical_event: '{"type":"event","event":"userPaused","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"stopReason":"userPaused","sentinelPath":"{state_paths.pause_sentinel}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
799:         rule_stuck_recovery:
800:           raw_event_forbidden: '{"type":"event","event":"stuck_recovery"}'
801:           canonical_event: '{"type":"event","event":"stuckRecovery","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"stopReason":"stuckRecovery","fromIteration":{current_iteration},"outcome":"recovered","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
802: 
803:       step_marker_scan:
804:         action: "H-2 loop-prevention guard: scan previous iteration's rendered prompt for nested research marker"
805:         algorithm: |
806:           if current_iteration > 1:
807:             PREV_PROMPT_PATH = "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{previous_iteration}.md"
808:             if file_exists(PREV_PROMPT_PATH):
809:               PREV_PROMPT_FIRST_LINE = head -1 of PREV_PROMPT_PATH
810:               if PREV_PROMPT_FIRST_LINE matches ^(DEEP-REVIEW|DEEP-RESEARCH|CODE-REVIEW)$:
811:                 log "ERROR: nested research-of-review loop detected (marker found in previous iteration prompt). Aborting."
812:                 halt with exit code 2
813:         note: |
814:           False-positive prevention: only matches when the first line is exactly one of the
815:           three canonical markers. Markers appearing in comments or body text are ignored.
816:           True-positive triggers only when a previous iteration's rendered prompt literally
817:           starts with a deep-loop marker, indicating a nested research-of-review dispatch.
818: 
819:       step_dispatch_iteration:
820:         action: "Dispatch one iteration via the selected executor"
821:         resolve_executor:
822:           source: "config.executor"
823:           loader: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts#parseExecutorConfig"
824:         pre_dispatch:
825:           generate_summary: |
826:             STATE SUMMARY (auto-generated):
827:             Segment: {current_segment} | Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}
828:             Questions: {answered_count}/{total_questions} answered | Last focus: {last_focus}
829:             Last 2 ratios: {ratio_prev} -> {ratio_latest} | Stuck count: {stuck_count}
830:             {resource_map_prompt_line}
831:             {memory_context_prompt_line}
832:             Next focus: {next_focus}
833:           render_prompt_pack:
834:             template_path: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/assets/prompt_pack_iteration.md.tmpl"
835:             renderer: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/prompt-pack.ts#renderPromptPack"
836:             output_path: "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md"
837:             variables:
838:               state_summary: "{state_summary}"
839:               research_topic: "{research_topic}"
840:               current_iteration: "{current_iteration}"
841:               max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
842:               next_focus: "{next_focus}"
843:               remaining_questions_list: "{remaining_questions_list}"
844:               carried_forward_open_questions: "{carried_forward_open_questions}"
845:               last_3_summaries: "{last_3_summaries}"
846:               state_paths_config: "{state_paths.config}"
847:               state_paths_state_log: "{state_paths.state_log}"
848:               state_paths_strategy: "{state_paths.strategy}"
849:               state_paths_registry: "{state_paths.registry}"
850:               state_paths_iteration_pattern: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
851:               state_paths_delta_pattern: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
852:         pre_dispatch_audit:
853:           skip_when: "config.executor.type == 'native'"
854:           call: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts#writeFirstRecordExecutor"
855:           args:
856:             stateLogPath: "{state_paths.state_log}"
857:             executor: "{config.executor}"
858:             iteration: "{current_iteration}"
859:         branch_on: "config.executor.type"
860:         if_native:
861:           dispatch:
862:             agent: deep-research
863:             model: opus
864:             context_source: "rendered_prompt_pack"
865:           wait_for_completion: true
866:         if_cli_claude_code:
867:           command: |
868:             node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
869:             import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
870: 
871:             import { runAuditedExecutorCommand } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';
872:             import { resolveClaudePermissionMode } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts';
873: 
874:             const executor = {
875:               kind: 'cli-claude-code',
876:               model: '{config.executor.model}',
877:               reasoningEffort: '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}',
878:               serviceTier: '{config.executor.serviceTier}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.serviceTier}',
879:               sandboxMode: '{config.executor.sandboxMode}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.sandboxMode}',
880:               timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),
881:             };
882:             const args = [
883:               '-p',
884:               readFileSync('{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md', 'utf8'),
885:               '--model',
886:               executor.model,
887:               '--permission-mode',
888:               resolveClaudePermissionMode(executor.sandboxMode),
889:               '--output-format',
890:               'text',
891:             ];
892:             if (executor.reasoningEffort) {
893:               args.push('--effort', executor.reasoningEffort);
894:             }
895: 
896:             process.exit(
897:               runAuditedExecutorCommand({
898:                 command: 'claude',
899:                 args,
900:                 cwd: '{repo_root}',
901:                 timeoutSeconds: executor.timeoutSeconds,
902:                 stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',
903:                 executor,
904:                 iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),
905:               }),
906:             );
907:             EOF
908:           working_directory: "{repo_root}"
909:           timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
910:           wait_for_completion: true
911:           notes:
912:             - "sandboxMode maps to permission-mode: read-only -> plan, workspace-write -> acceptEdits, danger-full-access -> bypassPermissions"
913:             - "claude-code has no serviceTier flag"
914:             - "claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth"
915:         record_executor_audit:
916:           skip_when: "config.executor.type == 'native'"
917:           target: "{state_paths.state_log}"
918:           field: "executor"
919:           value:
920:             kind: "{config.executor.type}"
921:             model: "{config.executor.model}"
922:             reasoningEffort: "{config.executor.reasoningEffort}"
923:             serviceTier: "{config.executor.serviceTier}"
924:         if_cli_opencode:
925:           command: |
926:             opencode run \
927:               --model "{config.executor.model}" \
928:               --format json \
929:               --dangerously-skip-permissions \
930:               --pure \
931:               --dir "{repo_root}" \
932:               {optional_variant_flag} \
933:               "$(printf '%s\n\n' 'Resolved route: mode=research; target_agent=@deep-research; execution=single_iteration; state_source=externalized_files; do_not_switch_mode=true'; cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
934:               </dev/null
935:           working_directory: "{repo_root}"
936:           timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
937:           wait_for_completion: true
938:           render_hint:
939:             optional_variant_flag: |
940:               If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --variant {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
941:               Otherwise expand to empty string.
942:           notes:
943:             - "opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is fed via command substitution"
944:             - "--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)"
945:             - "--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)"
946:             - "cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude Code/raw shell). The cli-opencode skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate"
947:             - "</dev/null required: opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation. Without explicit closed stdin, automation that redirects stdout/stderr hangs at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. See cli-opencode SKILL.md §4 ALWAYS rule + memory feedback_opencode_run_requires_dev_null_stdin.md."
948:         post_dispatch_validate:
949:           validator: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs"
950:           assert_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
951:           assert_appended: "{state_paths.state_log}"
952:           assert_jsonl_fields: [type, iteration, newInfoRatio, status, focus, mode, target_agent, agent_definition_loaded, resolved_route]
953:           route_proof:
954:             mode: research
955:             target_agent: deep-research
956:             agent_definition_loaded: true
957:             resolved_route: "Resolved route: mode=research target_agent=deep-research"
958:           optional_jsonl_fields:
959:             logOffset: "Byte offset where the seekable log region starts"
960:             logSize: "Byte length of the seekable log region"
961:             logPath: "Absolute path to the file containing the seekable log region"
962:             skippedCount: "Missed fixed-rate slots counted for the completed dispatch; 0 when no slot was missed"
963:             slotDurationMs: "Monotonic elapsed duration for the completed dispatch slot"
964:           assert_canonical_type: "iteration"
965:           assert_delta_file_exists: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
966:           assert_delta_file_has_iteration_record: true
967:           on_failure:
968:             action: "emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event"
969:             escalation: "After 3 consecutive failures, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context"
970:           failure_reasons_reference:
971:             - "iteration_file_missing — iteration narrative markdown not written"
972:             - "iteration_file_empty — iteration narrative markdown is zero bytes"
973:             - "jsonl_not_appended — state log file did not grow since pre-dispatch snapshot"
974:             - "jsonl_missing_fields — last state-log record omits required schema fields"
975:             - "jsonl_parse_error — last state-log line is not valid JSON"
976:             - "jsonl_wrong_type — last state-log record uses type!='iteration' (e.g. 'iteration_delta'); reducer will silently drop"
977:             - "delta_file_missing — per-iteration deltas/iter-NNN.jsonl not written"
978:             - "delta_file_empty — per-iteration delta file exists but has zero bytes"
979:             - "delta_file_missing_iteration_record — delta file lacks any record with type='iteration'"
980:             - "route_proof_missing — state-log or delta iteration record omits route-proof fields"
981:             - "route_proof_mismatch — state-log or delta iteration record does not match the resolved deep route"
982:             - "executor_missing — non-native executor did not record provenance"
983:             - "dispatch_failure_logged — last record is an explicit dispatch_failure event"
984: 
985:       step_run_now_restore_check:
986:         action: "Record a run-now sentinel recreated during the completed dispatch"
987:         command: |
988:           node <<'EOF'
989:           const { appendFileSync, existsSync, readFileSync } = require('node:fs');
990: 
991:           const stateLogPath = "{state_paths.state_log}";
992:           const sentinelPath = "{state_paths.run_now_sentinel}";
993:           const timestamp = "{ISO_8601_NOW}";
994:           const sessionId = "{config.lineage.sessionId}";
995:           const generation = Number("{config.lineage.generation}");
996:           const run = Number("{current_iteration}");
997: 
998:           function hasAcceptedCurrentRun() {
999:             if (!existsSync(stateLogPath)) return false;
1000:             const lines = readFileSync(stateLogPath, "utf8").trim().split(/\r?\n/).filter(Boolean);
1001:             for (let index = lines.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
1002:               const record = JSON.parse(lines[index]);
1003:               if (record.run !== run || record.sessionId !== sessionId) continue;
1004:               if (record.event === "run_now_accepted") return true;
1005:               if (record.event === "run_now_rejected") return false;
1006:             }
1007:             return false;
1008:           }
1009: 
1010:           if (existsSync(sentinelPath) && hasAcceptedCurrentRun()) {
1011:             appendFileSync(
1012:               stateLogPath,
1013:               `${JSON.stringify({
1014:                 type: "event",
1015:                 event: "run_now_restored",
1016:                 mode: "research",
1017:                 run,
1018:                 sentinelPath,
1019:                 timestamp,
1020:                 sessionId,
1021:                 generation,
1022:               })}\n`,
1023:               "utf8",
1024:             );
1025:           }
1026:           EOF
1027:         outputs:
1028:           - run_now_restored: "Emitted when an operator recreates the sentinel before the accepted dispatch completes"
1029: 
1030:       step_reduce_state:
1031:         action: "Run the reducer to synchronize registry, dashboard, and strategy"
1032:         command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}"
1033:         inputs:
1034:           latestJSONLDelta: "Latest JSONL records written since the previous iteration"
1035:           newIterationFile: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
1036:           priorReducedState: "{state_paths.registry}"
1037:         outputs:
1038:           - "{state_paths.registry}"
1039:           - "{state_paths.dashboard}"
1040:           - "{state_paths.strategy}"
1041:           - "{state_paths.state_log} question_conflict events when inbox text disagrees with registry-owned question text"
1042:           - "{state_paths.state_log} idempotent idea_promoted events when observed ideas reach minIdeaObservations"
1043:           - "{state_paths.registry} observedIdeas, promotedIdeas, suppressedIdeas, rejectedPatterns, and suppressedCandidates from idea lifecycle events"
1044:         failure_modes:
1045:           malformed_delta: "skip + warn"
1046:           missing_iteration_file: "no-op + error"
1047:           schema_mismatch: "reject + conflict event"
1048:           question_conflict: "keep registry value + append question_conflict event with inboxValue, registryValue, and operatorDecision"
1049:         guarantee: "Idempotent for identical inputs"
1050: 
1051:       step_graph_upsert:
1052:         action: "Persist the latest iteration graph delta after the reducer refresh and after the iteration file exists"
1053:         read:
1054:           - "{state_paths.state_log}"
1055:         extract:
1056:           - latest_graph_events: "Read graphEvents from the latest iteration record, else []"
1057:           - graph_upsert_nodes_json: "Map latest_graph_events where type == 'node' to node payloads with label -> name and preserve remaining node fields"
1058:           - graph_upsert_edges_json: "Map latest_graph_events where type == 'edge' to edge payloads with source -> sourceId, target -> targetId, relation -> uppercase(relation), and preserve remaining edge fields"
1059:           - graph_upsert_event_count: "Count mapped node and edge events"
1060:         if_graph_events_present:
1061:           bash: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/upsert.cjs --spec-folder \"{spec_folder}\" --loop-type \"research\" --session-id \"{config.lineage.sessionId}\" --nodes '{graph_upsert_nodes_json}' --edges '{graph_upsert_edges_json}'"
1062:           note: "Skip silently when graphEvents is missing or empty."
1063:         if_graph_events_missing:
1064:           proceed: true
1065: 
1066:       step_memory_upsert_iteration:
1067:         action: "Upsert the canonical iteration evidence into Spec Kit Memory after reducer and graph persistence"
1068:         mcp_tool: memory_save
1069:         invocation: 'memory_save({ filePath: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}" })'
1070:         timeout_seconds: 5
1071:         idempotency: "Re-running the same iteration file is safe because the memory backend upserts by path/content."
1072:         failure_policy:
1073:           mcp_error: "non-fatal; log advisory warning and continue"
1074:           timeout: "non-fatal after timeout_seconds; log advisory warning and continue"
1075:         outputs:
1076:           - memory_upsert_iteration_file: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
1077:           - memory_upsert_status: "upserted | advisory_error"
