1079:       step_refresh_memory_context:
1080:         action: "Refresh focused Spec Kit Memory context before the next prompt render"
1081:         mcp_tool: memory_context
1082:         invocation: 'memory_context({ input: "{research_topic}", mode: "focused", intent: "understand", includeContent: true })'
1083:         timeout_seconds: 5
1084:         use_response:
1085:           - "Update memory_context_prompt_line with a concise summary for the next step_dispatch_iteration.pre_dispatch.generate_summary."
1086:         failure_policy:
1087:           mcp_error: "non-fatal; log advisory warning and continue with the previous memory_context_prompt_line"
1088:           timeout: "non-fatal after timeout_seconds; log advisory warning and continue with the previous memory_context_prompt_line"
1089:         outputs:
1090:           - memory_context_prompt_line: "Fresh focused context summary for the next iteration prompt"
1091:           - memory_context_refresh_status: "refreshed | advisory_error"
1092: 
1093:       step_evaluate_results:
1094:         action: "Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics"
1095:         verify:
1096:           - file_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
1097:           - jsonl_appended: "New iteration record in state.jsonl"
1098:           - strategy_updated: "Reducer refreshed strategy machine-owned sections"
1099:           - registry_updated: "Reducer refreshed deep-research-findings-registry.json"
1100:         extract:
1101:           - newInfoRatio: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
1102:           - findings_count: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
1103:           - status: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
1104:           - latest_focus: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
1105:         on_missing_outputs:
1106:           action: "Mark iteration as 'error', continue to next"
1107:           # Canonical iteration record: include mode, sessionId, generation, durationMs, keyQuestions, answeredQuestions
1108:           # so the reducer can persist the failure without dropping the iteration. Schema source: state_format.md §Iteration Records.
1109:           append_jsonl: '{"type":"iteration","run":{current_iteration},"mode":"research","status":"error","focus":"{next_focus}","findingsCount":0,"newInfoRatio":0.0,"keyQuestions":[],"answeredQuestions":[],"durationMs":0,"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
1110: 
1111:       step_telemetry_heartbeat_progress:
1112:         action: "Emit a single-loop progress row when iteration state changes"
1113:         skip_when: "config.fanout is present"
1114:         command: |
1115:           node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
1116:           import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
1117: 
1118:           import { appendJsonlIfChangedAtomic } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/atomic-state.ts';
1119:           import observabilityEvents from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/observability-events.cjs';
1120: 
1121:           const { appendObservabilityEvent } = observabilityEvents;
1122:           const stateLogPath = '{state_paths.state_log}';
1123:           const timestamp = '{ISO_8601_NOW}';
1124:           const sessionId = '{config.lineage.sessionId}';
1125:           const generation = Number('{config.lineage.generation}');
1126:           const observabilityPath = '{state_paths.packet_dir}/observability-events.jsonl';
1127: 
1128:           function readRecords(path) {
1129:             if (!existsSync(path)) return [];
1130:             return readFileSync(path, 'utf8')
1131:               .split(/\r?\n/)
1132:               .map((line) => line.trim())
1133:               .filter(Boolean)
1134:               .map((line) => JSON.parse(line));
1135:           }
1136: 
1137:           function elapsedSince(value) {
1138:             const startedAtMs = Date.parse(String(value ?? ''));
1139:             const nowMs = Date.parse(timestamp);
1140:             if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtMs) || !Number.isFinite(nowMs)) return 0;
1141:             return Math.max(0, nowMs - startedAtMs);
1142:           }
1143: 
1144:           const records = readRecords(stateLogPath);
1145:           const iterations = records.filter((record) => record.type === 'iteration');
1146:           const latest = iterations.at(-1) ?? {};
1147:           const startedAt = records.find((record) => typeof record.createdAt === 'string')?.createdAt
1148:             ?? records.find((record) => typeof record.timestamp === 'string')?.timestamp
1149:             ?? timestamp;
1150:           const elapsedMs = elapsedSince(startedAt);
1151:           const score = Number.isFinite(Number(latest.newInfoRatio)) ? Number(latest.newInfoRatio) : 0;
1152:           const run = Number.isFinite(Number(latest.run)) ? Number(latest.run) : Number('{current_iteration}');
1153:           const status = typeof latest.status === 'string' ? latest.status : 'unknown';
1154:           const row = {
1155:             event: 'progress',
1156:             label: 'single',
1157:             at: timestamp,
1158:             duration_ms: elapsedMs,
1159:             loop_type: 'research',
1160:             sessionId,
1161:             generation,
1162:             run,
1163:             status,
1164:             gauges: { iterations: iterations.length, elapsed_ms: elapsedMs, score },
1165:           };
1166: 
1167:           const appended = appendJsonlIfChangedAtomic('{state_paths.status_ledger}', row, {
1168:             diffData: { event: row.event, label: row.label, sessionId, generation, run, status, gauges: { iterations: iterations.length, score } },
1169:             diffField: 'state_hash',
1170:           });
1171:           if (appended) {
1172:             try {
1173:               appendObservabilityEvent(observabilityPath, row, {
1174:                 producer: 'deep-research-auto',
1175:                 stream: 'single-loop-telemetry',
1176:                 subject: { label: row.label, sessionId, generation, run },
1177:                 event: row.event,
1178:                 status,
1179:               });
1180:             } catch {}
1181:           }
1182:           EOF
1183:         working_directory: "{repo_root}"
1184:         outputs:
1185:           - status_ledger_progress: "A fan-out-shaped status row with label single and event progress"
1186: 
1187:       step_generate_dashboard:
1188:         action: "Generate or refresh the human-readable dashboard"
1189:         read:
1190:           - "{state_paths.state_log}"
1191:           - "{state_paths.registry}"
1192:           - "{state_paths.strategy}"
1193:         template: .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/assets/deep_research_dashboard.md
1194:         output: "{state_paths.dashboard}"
1195:         note: "Auto-generated from JSONL + reducer registry + strategy. Never manually edited."
1196: 
1197:       step_update_tracking:
1198:         action: "Update loop tracking variables"
1199:         set:
1200:           current_iteration: "{current_iteration + 1}"
1201:           stuck_count: "if status == 'thought': unchanged (skip). if status == 'insight': 0 (reset). if newInfoRatio < convergence_threshold: stuck_count + 1, else: 0"
1202:         log: "Iteration {N} complete. newInfoRatio: {newInfoRatio}. Findings: {findings_count}. Stuck count: {stuck_count}."
1203: 
1204:       step_loop_decision:
1205:         action: "Return to step_read_state for next iteration"
1206:         goto: step_read_state
1207: 
1208:   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1209:   # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
1210:   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1211:   phase_synthesis:
1212:     purpose: Compile all iteration findings into final research/research.md
1213:     steps:
1214: 
1215:       step_fanout_merge:
1216:         description: "Merge N lineage registries into one consolidated registry; skip when single-executor"
1217:         skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
1218:         command: |
1219:           node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \
1220:             --loop-type research \
1221:             --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
1222:         working_directory: "{repo_root}"
1223:         wait_for_completion: true
1224: 
1225:       step_hydrate_summary_metrics:
1226:         action: "Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis"
1227:         read:
1228:           - "{state_paths.config}"
1229:           - "{state_paths.state_log}"
1230:           - "{state_paths.registry}"
1231:           - "{state_paths.strategy}"
1232:         extract:
1233:           - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
1234:           - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
1235:           - current_segment: "Latest segment_start event segment, else 1"
1236:           - last_focus: "Extract focus from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
1237:           - ratio_prev: "Extract newInfoRatio from second-latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
1238:           - ratio_latest: "Extract newInfoRatio from latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
1239:           - remaining_questions: "Count unchecked items in 'Key Questions'"
1240:           - remaining_questions_list: "List unchecked key questions from strategy.md"
1241:           - answered_count: "Count answered questions from strategy.md"
1242:           - total_questions: "Count total questions tracked in strategy.md"
1243:           - last_3_summaries: "Summarize the latest 3 iteration records as 'run N: focus (ratio)'"
1244:           - reason: "Use the latest synthesis/recovery stop reason if present, else the frozen default 'converged'. (Must be a member of the STOP_REASONS enum: converged, maxIterationsReached, blockedStop, stuckRecovery, error, manualStop, userPaused.)"
1245: 
1246:       step_read_all_iterations:
1247:         action: "Read all iteration files and strategy"
1248:         read_pattern: "{state_paths.iteration_dir}/iteration-*.md"
1249:         read_also: "{state_paths.strategy}"
1250: 
1251:       step_emit_resource_map:
1252:         action: "Emit {state_paths.resource_map_output} from converged research deltas unless config.resource_map.emit is false"
1253:         command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-research/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder} --emit-resource-map"
1254:         read:
1255:           - "{state_paths.config}"
1256:           - "{state_paths.delta_dir}/iter-*.jsonl"
1257:         write:
1258:           - "{state_paths.resource_map_output}"
1259:         guarantee: "Reducer skips cleanly when config.resource_map.emit == false and writes a deterministic resource-map when enabled."
1260: 
1261:       step_compile_research:
1262:         action: "Compile or finalize research/research.md"
1263:         instructions: |
1264:           If research/research.md exists (progressive synthesis was active):
1265:             1. Read current research/research.md
1266:             2. Consolidate and deduplicate findings across all iterations
1267:             3. Fill any empty sections with findings from iteration files
1268:             4. Remove redundancy while preserving all unique findings
1269:             5. Add convergence report as appendix
1270:             6. If `resource_map_present` is true, cite `{spec_folder}/resource-map.md` in References; otherwise omit any placeholder map citation
1271: 
1272:           If research/research.md does not exist:
1273:             1. Create research/research.md following 17-section template
1274:             2. Populate sections from iteration files
1275:             3. Add citations from original sources
1276:             4. Note unanswered questions in Open Questions section
1277:             5. If `resource_map_present` is true, cite `{spec_folder}/resource-map.md` in References; otherwise omit any placeholder map citation
1278:           Preserve machine-owned markers so the reducer-owned registry, dashboard, and strategy anchors can be refreshed on re-run without mutating prior synthesis. (Note: `completed-continue` lineage branch is deferred — see `deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branch Contract`.)
1279:         output: "{state_paths.research_output}"
1280: 
1281:       step_convergence_report:
1282:         action: "Generate and append convergence report"
1283:         report: |
1284:           ## Convergence Report
1285:           - Stop reason: {reason}
1286:           - Total iterations: {iteration_count}
1287:           - Questions answered: {answered_count} / {total_questions}
1288:           - Remaining questions: {remaining_questions}
1289:           - Last 3 iteration summaries: {last_3_summaries}
1290:           - Convergence threshold: {convergence_threshold}
1291:           - Segment transitions, wave scores, and checkpoint metrics are experimental and omitted from the live report.
1292:         command: |
1293:           node --input-type=module <<'EOF'
1294:           import { appendFileSync, existsSync, readFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs';
1295: 
1296:           const paths = {
1297:             stateLog: String.raw`{state_paths.state_log}`,
1298:             registry: String.raw`{state_paths.registry}`,
1299:             research: String.raw`{state_paths.research_output}`,
1300:             dashboard: String.raw`{state_paths.dashboard}`,
1301:           };
1302: 
1303:           function hasFile(filePath) {
1304:             try {
1305:               return existsSync(filePath) && statSync(filePath).isFile();
1306:             } catch {
1307:               return false;
1308:             }
1309:           }
1310: 
1311:           function readJson(filePath) {
1312:             try {
1313:               return JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8'));
1314:             } catch {
1315:               return null;
1316:             }
1317:           }
1318: 
1319:           function readJsonl(filePath) {
1320:             if (!hasFile(filePath)) return [];
1321:             return readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8')
1322:               .split(/\r?\n/)
1323:               .map((line) => line.trim())
1324:               .filter(Boolean)
1325:               .flatMap((line) => {
1326:                 try {
1327:                   return [JSON.parse(line)];
1328:                 } catch {
1329:                   return [];
1330:                 }
1331:               });
1332:           }
1333: 
1334:           function countIterationFindings(record) {
1335:             if (!record || record.type !== 'iteration') return 0;
1336:             const numeric = Number(record.findingsCount);
1337:             if (Number.isFinite(numeric) && numeric > 0) return Math.floor(numeric);
1338:             if (Array.isArray(record.keyFindings)) return record.keyFindings.length;
1339:             if (Array.isArray(record.findings)) return record.findings.length;
1340:             return 0;
1341:           }
1342: 
1343:           function normalizeFindingKey(value) {
1344:             return String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
1345:           }
1346: 
1347:           function findingKeys(candidate) {
1348:             if (typeof candidate === 'string') {
1349:               const key = normalizeFindingKey(candidate);
1350:               return key ? [key] : [];
1351:             }
1352:             if (!candidate || typeof candidate !== 'object' || Array.isArray(candidate)) return [];
1353:             return [...new Set([
1354:               candidate.id,
1355:               candidate.title,
1356:               candidate.summary,
1357:               candidate.text,
1358:               candidate.finding,
1359:               candidate.description,
1360:             ].map(normalizeFindingKey).filter(Boolean))];
1361:           }
1362: 
1363:           function collectIterationFindingGroups(record) {
1364:             if (!record || record.type !== 'iteration') return [];
1365:             const structured = [record.keyFindings, record.findings]
1366:               .find((value) => Array.isArray(value) && value.length > 0);
1367:             if (!Array.isArray(structured)) return [];
1368:             return structured
1369:               .map(findingKeys)
1370:               .filter((keys) => keys.length > 0);
1371:           }
1372: 
1373:           function collectRegistryFindingKeys(registry) {
1374:             if (!Array.isArray(registry?.keyFindings)) return [];
1375:             return registry.keyFindings
1376:               .flatMap(findingKeys);
1377:           }
1378: 
1379:           function appendEvent(event) {
1380:             appendFileSync(paths.stateLog, `${JSON.stringify(event)}\n`, 'utf8');
1381:           }
1382: 
1383:           const registry = readJson(paths.registry);
1384:           const registryFindingCount = Array.isArray(registry?.keyFindings) ? registry.keyFindings.length : null;
1385:           const stateRecords = readJsonl(paths.stateLog);
1386:           const iterationFindingCount = stateRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + countIterationFindings(record), 0);
1387:           const identifiableFindingGroups = stateRecords.flatMap(collectIterationFindingGroups);
1388:           const registryFindingKeys = new Set(collectRegistryFindingKeys(registry));
1389:           const missingStructuredFindingCount = identifiableFindingGroups.filter((keys) => !keys.some((key) => registryFindingKeys.has(key))).length;
1390:           const identifiableFindingCount = identifiableFindingGroups.length;
1391:           const missingArtifacts = [
1392:             ['registry', paths.registry],
1393:             ['research', paths.research],
1394:             ['dashboard', paths.dashboard],
1395:           ].filter(([, filePath]) => !hasFile(filePath)).map(([name, filePath]) => ({ name, path: filePath }));
1396:           const invariantFailures = [];
1397:           if (missingArtifacts.length > 0) invariantFailures.push('missing_synthesis_artifacts');
1398:           if (registryFindingCount === null) invariantFailures.push('registry_missing_keyFindings');
1399:           if (iterationFindingCount > 0 && (registryFindingCount ?? 0) === 0) invariantFailures.push('state_findings_not_reflected_in_registry');
1400:           if (identifiableFindingCount > 0 && registryFindingCount !== null && registryFindingCount < identifiableFindingCount) invariantFailures.push('structured_state_findings_partially_reflected_in_registry');
1401:           if (missingStructuredFindingCount > 0) invariantFailures.push('structured_state_findings_missing_from_registry');
1402: 
1403:           if (invariantFailures.length > 0) {
1404:             appendEvent({
1405:               type: 'event',
1406:               event: 'synthesis_incomplete',
1407:               mode: 'research',
1408:               severity: 'warning',
1409:               totalIterations: Number('{iteration_count}'),
1410:               answeredCount: Number('{answered_count}'),
1411:               totalQuestions: Number('{total_questions}'),
1412:               stopReason: '{reason}',
1413:               reason: 'synthesis_artifact_invariant_failed',
1414:               invariantFailures,
1415:               missingArtifacts,
1416:               registryFindingCount,
1417:               iterationFindingCount,
1418:               identifiableFindingCount,
1419:               missingStructuredFindingCount,
1420:               timestamp: '{ISO_8601_NOW}',
1421:             });
1422:           } else {
1423:             appendEvent({
1424:               type: 'event',
1425:               event: 'synthesis_complete',
1426:               totalIterations: Number('{iteration_count}'),
1427:               answeredCount: Number('{answered_count}'),
1428:               totalQuestions: Number('{total_questions}'),
1429:               stopReason: '{reason}',
1430:               timestamp: '{ISO_8601_NOW}',
1431:             });
1432:           }
1433:           EOF
1434: 
1435:       step_writeback_spec_findings:
1436:         action: "Write or replace the bounded generated findings block in spec.md before config completion"
1437:         edit: "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
1438:         host_anchor: "Use the chosen host anchor required by spec_check_protocol"
1439:         generated_fence_begin: "<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: deep-research/spec-findings -->"
1440:         generated_fence_end: "<!-- END GENERATED: deep-research/spec-findings -->"
1441:         fail_closed_conflict_check:
1442:           if_existing_generated_fence_present:
1443:             detect_manual_edits: "Use generated checksum metadata or an explicit MANUAL-EDIT marker inside the existing fence to detect human edits before overwrite."
1444:             on_manual_edit_conflict:
1445:               append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_mutation_conflict","folder_state":"conflict-detected","reason":"Manual edits detected inside existing generated findings fence.","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","generatedFence":"deep-research/spec-findings","conflictKind":"generated-fence-manual-edit","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
1446:               halt: true
1447:         instructions:
1448:           - "Read `{state_paths.research_output}` as the canonical synthesis source."
1449:           - "Replace exactly one generated findings block under the chosen host anchor."
1450:           - "Fail closed if the host anchor is missing, duplicate markers exist, or human edits are detected inside the generated block."
1451:           - "Do not overwrite a generated block that fails checksum validation or carries an explicit MANUAL-EDIT marker."
1452:           - "Emit `spec_synthesis_deferred` instead of partial output when synthesis cannot safely write back."
1453:         append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_mutation","phase":"post-synthesis","anchors_touched":["<chosen host anchor>"],"diff_summary":"Replaced generated deep-research findings fence from research/research.md.","generatedFence":"deep-research/spec-findings","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
1454: 
1455:       step_validate_post_synthesis_spec_doc:
1456:         action: "Run targeted strict validation after deep-research writes back into spec.md"
1457:         command: "SPECKIT_RULES=FRONTMATTER_VALID,LEVEL_DECLARED,TEMPLATE_SOURCE,TEMPLATE_HEADERS,PLACEHOLDER_FILLED,SECTIONS_PRESENT,ANCHORS_VALID,SPEC_DOC_INTEGRITY,TOC_POLICY bash .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/validate.sh {spec_folder} --strict"
1458:         note: "Fail closed before completion if the deep-research spec.md sync breaks the authored-spec structural contract. This targeted check uses the fast Node validation orchestrator."
1459: 
1460:       step_update_config_status:
1461:         action: "Mark config as complete"
1462:         edit: "{state_paths.config}"
1463:         set_field: { status: "complete" }
1464: 
1465:       step_telemetry_heartbeat_terminal:
1466:         action: "Emit a single-loop terminal row in the orchestration status ledger"
1467:         skip_when: "config.fanout is present"
1468:         terminal_events: [completed, failed, stopped]
1469:         command: |
1470:           node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
1471:           import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
1472: 
1473:           import { appendJsonlIfChangedAtomic } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/atomic-state.ts';
1474:           import observabilityEvents from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/observability-events.cjs';
1475: 
1476:           const { appendObservabilityEvent } = observabilityEvents;
1477:           const stateLogPath = '{state_paths.state_log}';
1478:           const config = JSON.parse(readFileSync('{state_paths.config}', 'utf8'));
1479:           const timestamp = '{ISO_8601_NOW}';
1480:           const sessionId = String(config.lineage?.sessionId ?? '{config.lineage.sessionId}');
1481:           const generation = Number(config.lineage?.generation ?? '{config.lineage.generation}');
1482:           const reason = '{reason}';
1483:           const observabilityPath = '{state_paths.packet_dir}/observability-events.jsonl';
1484: 
1485:           function readRecords(path) {
1486:             if (!existsSync(path)) return [];
1487:             return readFileSync(path, 'utf8')
1488:               .split(/\r?\n/)
1489:               .map((line) => line.trim())
1490:               .filter(Boolean)
1491:               .map((line) => JSON.parse(line));
1492:           }
1493: 
1494:           function elapsedSince(value) {
1495:             const startedAtMs = Date.parse(String(value ?? ''));
1496:             const nowMs = Date.parse(timestamp);
1497:             if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtMs) || !Number.isFinite(nowMs)) return 0;
1498:             return Math.max(0, nowMs - startedAtMs);
1499:           }
1500: 
1501:           function terminalEvent(stopReason) {
1502:             if (stopReason === 'manualStop' || stopReason === 'userPaused') return 'stopped';
1503:             if (stopReason === 'error') return 'failed';
1504:             return 'completed';
1505:           }
1506: 
1507:           const records = readRecords(stateLogPath);
1508:           const iterations = records.filter((record) => record.type === 'iteration');
1509:           const latest = iterations.at(-1) ?? {};
1510:           const startedAt = records.find((record) => typeof record.createdAt === 'string')?.createdAt
1511:             ?? records.find((record) => typeof record.timestamp === 'string')?.timestamp
1512:             ?? timestamp;
1513:           const elapsedMs = elapsedSince(startedAt);
1514:           const score = Number.isFinite(Number(latest.newInfoRatio)) ? Number(latest.newInfoRatio) : 0;
1515:           const event = terminalEvent(reason);
1516:           const row = {
1517:             event,
1518:             label: 'single',
1519:             terminal: true,
1520:             reason,
1521:             at: timestamp,
1522:             duration_ms: elapsedMs,
1523:             loop_type: 'research',
1524:             sessionId,
1525:             generation,
1526:             gauges: { iterations: iterations.length, elapsed_ms: elapsedMs, score },
1527:           };
1528: 
1529:           const appended = appendJsonlIfChangedAtomic('{state_paths.status_ledger}', row, {
1530:             diffData: { event, label: row.label, reason, sessionId, generation, gauges: { iterations: iterations.length, score } },
1531:             diffField: 'state_hash',
1532:           });
1533:           if (appended) {
1534:             try {
1535:               appendObservabilityEvent(observabilityPath, row, {
1536:                 producer: 'deep-research-auto',
1537:                 stream: 'single-loop-telemetry',
1538:                 subject: { label: row.label, sessionId, generation, reason },
1539:                 event,
1540:                 status: event,
1541:               });
1542:             } catch {}
1543:           }
1544:           EOF
1545:         working_directory: "{repo_root}"
1546:         outputs:
1547:           - status_ledger_terminal: "A fan-out-shaped status row with label single and event completed, failed, or stopped"
1548: 
1549:       step_stage_artifact_dir:
1550:         action: "Stage all skill-owned artifacts under artifact_dir for the operator's next git commit"
1551:         command: "git add {state_paths.packet_dir}"
1552:         note: "Skill-owned contract fix (028): without this stage step, operators who do `git add research-report.md` lose the iteration trail (iterations/, deltas/, state.jsonl, strategy, etc.). Staging the whole artifact_dir keeps the audit trail intact. Operators retain commit authority and can `git restore --staged {path}` to unstage anything before commit. Failure is non-fatal — log warning and continue."
1553:         on_fail: "Log warning. Do not block synthesis. The artifact_dir may be outside a git repo (e.g., temp test fixture) which is a valid case."
1554: 
1555:   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1556:   # PHASE 4: SAVE
1557:   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1558:   phase_save:
1559:     purpose: Preserve research context to memory system
1560:     steps:
1561: 
1562:       step_compose_save_payload:
1563:         action: "Compose the structured JSON payload consumed by generate-context.js"
1564:         output: "/tmp/save-context-data-<session-id>.json"
1565:         requirements:
1566:           - "Write this file before invoking generate-context.js; the loader fails closed if the explicit JSON file is absent."
1567:           - "Include `specFolder`, a concise `sessionSummary`, curated `observations`, `recent_context`, `toolCalls`, and `exchanges` from the completed research loop."
1568:           - "Use a session-scoped temp filename; do not use the retired shared `/tmp/save-context-data.json` path."
1569:         example_payload: |
1570:           {
1571:             "specFolder": "{spec_folder}",
1572:             "sessionSummary": "Deep research completed; see research/research.md for synthesized findings.",
1573:             "observations": ["Summarize the final research conclusions and evidence."],
1574:             "recent_context": ["Point to the generated research artifacts and next action."],
1575:             "exchanges": [],
1576:             "toolCalls": []
1577:           }
1578: 
1579:       step_generate_context:
1580:         action: "Route continuity content into the correct canonical spec document via generate-context.js"
1581:         command: "node .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/dist/memory/generate-context.js /tmp/save-context-data-<session-id>.json {spec_folder}"
1582:         critical_rule: "NEVER manually author files under retired memory/ paths (the runtime rejects them); use generate-context.js so the save routes into decision-record.md, implementation-summary.md, or handover.md"
1583: 
1584:       step_index_memory:
1585:         action: "Index the routed canonical spec document with memory_save when immediate MCP visibility is required"
1586:         mcp_tool: memory_save
1587:         invocation: 'memory_save({ filePath: "[routed-canonical-spec-doc-path]" })'
1588:         note: "Use the actual canonical spec-doc path returned by generate-context.js (decision-record.md, implementation-summary.md, or handover.md); memory_index_scan remains the bulk fallback"
1589: 
1590:       step_verify_save:
1591:         action: "Verify canonical save routed content into the correct spec document"
1592:         check: "Does {spec_folder}/implementation-summary.md, {spec_folder}/decision-record.md, or {spec_folder}/handover.md carry the new continuity update?"
1593:         on_fail: "Log warning but do not block completion"
1594: 
1595:       step_release_lock:
1596:         action: "Release the single-writer lock after save, skip-save, or cancellation cleanup has resolved"
1597:         command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/loop-lock.cjs release --lock-path {state_paths.lock_file} --owner-pid {captured_owner_pid}"
1598:         append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"lock_released","path":"{state_paths.lock_file}","releasePhase":"save","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
1599: 
1600:   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1601:   # COMPLETION
1602:   # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1603:   completion:
1604:     message: |
1605:       Deep research complete.
1606:       Iterations: {iteration_count} | Stop reason: {reason}
1607:       Questions answered: {answered_count}/{total_questions}
1608: 
1609:       Artifacts:
1610:         - research/research.md (compiled from {iteration_count} iterations)
1611:         - {iteration_count} iteration files in research/
1612:         - State files: config.json, state.jsonl, strategy.md, deep-research-findings-registry.json, dashboard.md
1613:         - Memory context saved
1614: 
1615:       STATUS=OK PATH={spec_folder}
1616:     next_steps:
1617:       - "/speckit:plan [feature-description]"
1618:       - "/deep:research [new-topic] (for related deep research)"
1619:       - "/memory:save {spec_folder} (refresh canonical continuity before the next session)"
1620: 
1621: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1622: # ERROR RECOVERY
1623: # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1624: error_recovery:
1625:   agent_dispatch_timeout: "Retry once with reduced scope (fewer research actions). If second timeout, mark as 'timeout' and continue."
1626:   state_file_missing: "If JSONL missing during loop, reconstruct from iteration files. If strategy missing, create minimal version."
1627:   consecutive_failures: "After 3 consecutive errors, halt loop and enter synthesis with partial findings."
